label: Commodity Regime
description: Regime detection dashboard with factor scores, trading signals, and active commodity positions with P&L.

0.5.note: no lib/mocks imports — data via useStrategiesData().

0.6.note: explicit isLoading guard renders loading card.

0.7.note: explicit empty guard (factors.length===0 && positions.length===0) renders empty card.

0.8.note: context does not expose error field; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass (0.8 partial — context error deferred).

1.1.note: commodityRegime sourced exclusively from useStrategiesData() hook.

1.3.note: org filter change propagates through context for strategies list.

1.6.note: NOTE: commodity regime data (currentRegime, factors, positions) is market-wide signal data — not scoped per org/client. Architecturally correct; scope filtering applies to strategy list, not regime indicators.

1.7.note: MOCK_COMMODITY_REGIME lives in strategies-data-context.tsx (not in lib/mocks/).

l1.notes: All 7 checks pass. Commodity regime data is intentionally global (market-wide signals).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time regime signals drive active positions), paper ✓ (simulated commodity positions), batch ✓ (historical regime analysis).

3.2.note: context reads useExecutionMode() and exposes isLive+mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget displays factor scores and positions in paper context. Read-only — no order buttons.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget. Data is context-driven.

3.3.note: Human verify: no order buttons (read-only display).

3.4.note: Human verify: batch indicator visible when in batch mode.

l3.notes: Agent checks done. Human must verify 3.3, 3.4.

4.1.note: No onClick handlers — read-only display widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.3.note: Human verify: factor table shows all 5 factors; positions table shows all commodity positions.

4.4.note: No interactive sorting in this widget (plain Table, not TableWidget).

4.8.note: Human verify: both tables scroll within widget bounds at small sizes.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human must verify 4.3, 4.8.

5.1.note: Target strategies: commodity-regime (TradFi), event-macro (uses regime signals), cross-asset-momentum. Widget serves TradFi/commodity strategy monitoring.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 10 tests covering render, loading state, empty state (no factors/positions), factor scores (BULLISH/BEARISH), positions (LONG/SHORT), regime badge variants (Trending/Transitioning). See tests/widgets/strategies/commodity-regime.test.tsx

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file; data from context.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo in widget — data destructured directly from hook. No deps to inline.

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: Replaced all 15 text-[10px] instances with text-micro (TableHead ×10, Badge ×3, section label divs ×2). --text-micro (0.625rem/10px) is defined in globals.css @theme inline block.
8.1.fix: Replaced text-[10px] → text-micro at 15 sites via replace_all.

8.3.note: Uses Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle (ui), Table (ui), Badge (ui). Shared primitives.

8.4.note: No img/input/interactive-div. Read-only display. Tables use proper thead/tbody.

8.5.note: Human verify: renders at minW=4, minH=4. Two tables may overflow at minH.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (text-micro token applied to 15 instances). 8.2-8.4 pass. 8.5 human-verify pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Commodity regime detection is a distinct analytical domain (TradFi) with unique factor scoring and regime classification logic. Not mergeable with DeFi risk widgets.

relationships.notes: Standalone display widget. Also available on overview tab — verify rendering at overview layout constraints.

dataContract.notes: Commodity regime data (5 factors, 5 positions) currently static mock. Production: should integrate with commodity data providers (CME, Bloomberg) and regime detection ML service.

gaps: No live commodity data feed integration
Regime detection algorithm not exposed (only output shown)
coverage.notes: Widget renders WTI Crude, Natural Gas, Gold, Copper, Soybeans positions. Available on overview tab.

findings.description: commodity-regime-widget.tsx — ~16 user-visible strings (most in domain for this widget class)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: commodity-regime-widget.tsx:61-103 — 15 instances of text-[10px] on TableHead cells, Badge, and section labels; no text-2xs token in globals.css
findings.fix: Replaced all 15 text-[10px] instances with text-micro (--text-micro=0.625rem/10px).

findings.description: context does not expose API error field; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions
findings.deferReason: requires context redesign — acceptable for current mock-data phase
